name: Edict of Continuity
reasoning: V3 best fulfills the prompt requirements with visible exposed rebar/metal scaffolding on the left side that frames the composition as specified, creating the post-apocalyptic science-fantasy blend. It maintains excellent warm sandstone and ivory tones with golden-hour lighting and long shadows, while the ethereal white light coalesces clearly above the street. The composition is balanced and readable at card size with a strong focal point down the central street. V1 lacks the concrete/steel ruins and metal framing elements entirely, appearing too purely medieval. V2 has better atmosphere but less visible rebar/metal structures compared to V3's prominent scaffolding.
